sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55833" key="katerhmo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατερημόω</orth>, <sense id="n55833.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strip entirely off</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὰ πτερά</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
